markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the Netwrix \<\> GrowthX engagement and align on goals.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Reverse a year-long organic traffic decline by driving high-intent pipeline, not just traffic volume. Success is measured by pipeline value, not just lead count.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Create new, technically deep content for mid-market "technical decision makers" (e.g., VPs of Infrastructure/Security) who need to build a business case for a technical solution.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Overcome a major brand awareness gap. Customers know acquired brands (e.g., StealthBits, PingCastle) but not Netwrix, hindering cross-sell and forcing a focus on "Microsoft gap-filler" products.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [**Execution:** The 8-week sprint focuses on new content creation. A strategy for optimizing Netwrix's large existing content library will be a fast-follow project.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Organic Traffic Decline & Brand Fragmentation

  - [**Performance:** Organic traffic has declined for over a year, a trend attributed to broad market shifts and a historical focus on "vanity metrics" (high-volume, low-intent traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**Brand Fragmentation:** A portfolio of 17+ acquired products creates a brand awareness gap. Customers know acquired brands but not Netwrix, hindering cross-sell.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Existing content is inconsistent and often lacks the technical depth required by the target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [**Internal Inefficiency:** Marketing's previous "pod" structure led to "random acts of marketing." The new leadership team is implementing integrated campaigns and improving "speed to lead" (response time to inquiries).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4413.0)

### The Solution: Strategic Content for Mid-Market Decision Makers

  - [**Target Audience:** Mid-market "technical decision makers" (e.g., VPs of Infrastructure/Security) who need to build a business case for a technical solution.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** "Technical content with a business outcome," moving beyond the current admin-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [**Core Value Prop:**](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
      - [**Fast Time to Value:** Netwrix Auditor is "up and running in 30 minutes."](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [**Cost-Effective Breadth:** A broad portfolio at a lower price point than enterprise competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=3378.0)
      - [**Microsoft Gap-Filler:** Products fill specific security and management gaps in Microsoft's ecosystem (e.g., granular just-in-time access).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [**Primary Trigger:** Compliance audits (e.g., CMMC).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)
  - [**Secondary Triggers:**](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
      - [**Competitor Actions:** Varonis deprecating on-prem support creates an opportunity for Netwrix's on-prem-strong portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)
      - [**Emerging Concerns:** AI security and machine identities are latent concerns that can be addressed proactively.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=2667.0)

### The Plan: 8-Week Sprint & Future Optimization

  - [**8-Week Sprint:** Focuses on new content creation to establish a baseline of high-quality, technically deep content.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**W1:** Kickoff & discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**W2:** Strategy development.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**W3:** Strategy review.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**W4:** Calibration articles to align on voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**W5+:** Content production ramp-up (3–5 blogs/week).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**Future Optimization:** A strategy for optimizing Netwrix's large existing content library will be a fast-follow project after the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Internal Alignment:** GrowthX's work will be distinct from internal efforts. The goal is to define separate "swim lanes" for each team to maximize output.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4251.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4691.0)
      - [Schedule a product deep dive with Chanel Chambers and potentially Adam Laub.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4691.0)
      - [Coordinate with Phil Denisenko for systems access (CMS, GA4, LMS).](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4756.0)
      - [Resolve the Slack channel issue or migrate to Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4811.0)
  - [**Netwrix:**](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4756.0)
      - [Provide access to internal content (e.g., LMS) to accelerate onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
      - [Share data on top-performing content by lead/pipeline generation.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=4054.0)
      - [Provide current organic pipeline metrics to establish a performance baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/_uCmgDRk8gNa3BDQzCqXEME-AWsFzfpG?tab=summary&timestamp=3533.0)
